narrative:
Cols 82-K (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,747 registered voters, with 65.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
